name: Internal documentation only
usage: No external system access and no state changes.

name: Local analysis and drafts
usage: Local repo work, planning, reporting, and non-live asset creation.

name: Read-only external observation
usage: Human-approved live observation after login or attachment.

name: State-changing external action
usage: Any live change outside the repo with explicit approval.

name: Critical irreversible action
usage: Production, financial, DNS, billing, or irreversible changes.
